g.text: Fear regime (32, rising) — selective longs targeting short-squeeze setups. Extreme negative
CHIP (-160% ann.) + BTC & AAVE OI alignment. Capped at 3 positions, diversified.
OI + technical + sentiment all bullish; neg funding pays
Extreme short squeeze: -160% funding + rising OI = textbook
OI + technicals bullish, DeFi diversification from BTC/CHIP
Three analysts bearish/neutral, fails ≥2 bullish threshold
OI bearish vs technical bullish, mixed signals, no consensus
